title: British Barramundi Wrap
description: A healthy and flavorful British-inspired dish featuring pan-seared barramundi, served with a tangy slaw and wrapped in a crispy wrap.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Season the barramundi fillet with salt and pepper.
3. Add a small amount of oil to the skillet and sear the barramundi for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
4. Meanwhile, combine the shredded cabbage, charred red onion, and mayonnaise in a bowl.
5. Stir in the lemon juice and season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Warm the wrap in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
7. Slice the cooked barramundi into thin pieces.
8. Assemble the wrap by placing the barramundi on one half of the wrap, followed by the slaw.
9. Fold the wrap in half to enclose the filling.
